Errorta generic HTML connector fixture

This fixture stands in for a real third-party HTML page that an Errorta brief author has declared as a seed URL. The body is intentionally long enough that the JS-only detector treats it as a real document with more than two hundred characters of visible text after script and style tags have been stripped from the extracted output.

Anchors below exercise the same-host filter, fragment stripping, and the hop-1 discovery cap.

  • First in-host article
  • Second article with fragment
  • Off-host link (should be filtered)
  • Same canonical id as first
